steps.action: Inspect cli_utils.py for timing markers and timing commits
steps.expected: time.monotonic and step timing fields are present
steps.observed: Found repeated time.monotonic usage and step_timing logging with api_ms/tool_ms fields; recent commits include per-step timing instrumentation

assertions.title: Timing output uses expected structured format

steps.action: Inspect step_timing log emission shape in cli_utils.py
steps.expected: Structured output includes step, timestamp, and api/tool timing breakdown
steps.observed: logger.info('step_timing', step=..., api_ms=..., tool_ms=..., tool_type=..., timestamp=...) appears at all parsed-yield points

steps.action: Search run artifacts for timing keys
steps.expected: Timing-related fields discoverable in run output
steps.observed: duration_api_ms fields are present in output JSONL logs; source-level step_timing schema is explicit and parseable

assertions.title: Existing tests still pass

steps.action: Run runner test suite command relevant to mission guidance
steps.observed: Command exited 1; failure in tests/runner/test_two_agent_runner.py::TestCanaryCLI::test_canary_flag_accepted_without_problem_or_model due to subprocess.TimeoutExpired after 30s

assertions.issues: Runner test suite did not fully pass in this environment (1 failed, 254 passed, 1 skipped, 1 deselected).

assertions.title: Network capture script exists and is syntactically valid

steps.action: Verify network capture script and run shell syntax check
steps.expected: network capture script exists under research/debug and passes bash -n
steps.observed: research/debug/network_capture.sh exists and bash -n exit code is 0

assertions.title: Pcap analysis script exists and is syntactically valid

steps.action: Verify pcap analysis script and parse syntax via ast
steps.expected: pcap analysis script exists and has valid Python syntax
steps.observed: research/debug/analyze_pcap.py exists and ast.parse succeeded (exit code 0)

assertions.title: Strace helper script exists and is syntactically valid

steps.action: Verify strace helper script and run shell syntax check
steps.expected: strace helper script exists under research/debug and passes bash -n
steps.observed: research/debug/strace_helper.sh exists and bash -n exit code is 0

steps.action: Inspect top-of-file headers/docstrings and usage sections
steps.observed: network_capture.sh and strace_helper.sh include usage comment blocks; analyze_pcap.py includes module docstring with usage and arguments

frictions.description: Working-tree git diff for cli_utils.py was empty because instrumentation was already committed; commit-level git show was required to capture timing additions.
frictions.resolution: Used git log and git show on recent cli_utils.py commits (dfae48b, 3afd3f5) for code-change evidence.

summary: Tested 8 assertions. 7 passed and 1 failed (VAL-INST-003: runner pytest command exited with one canary timeout failure).
